CREATE TABLE web_event (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE web_log (id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_message VARCHAR(255));
CREATE FUNCTION refresh_func() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN RETURN; END; $$ LANGUAGE SQL;
GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON TABLE web_event TO PUBLIC;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON TABLE web_log TO jan, piet WITH GRANT OPTION;
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION refresh_func TO PUBLIC;
GRANT COPY INTO, COPY FROM ON TABLE web_event TO mrdata;
GRANT SELECT ON TABLE web_event TO role_admin;
GRANT INSERT, UPDATE ON TABLE web_log TO user_a WITH GRANT OPTION;
GRANT ALL ON FUNCTION refresh_func TO role_user;
GRANT REFERENCES ON TABLE web_event TO PUBLIC;
GRANT COPY INTO ON TABLE web_log TO user_b;
GRANT SELECT ON TABLE web_event TO jan, piet, controller;
GRANT DELETE ON TABLE web_log TO PUBLIC;
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION refresh_func TO user_c;
GRANT TRUNCATE ON TABLE web_event TO user_d WITH GRANT OPTION;
